intended_use: AutoContour is intended to assist radiation treatment planners in contouring and reviewing structures within medical images in preparation for radiation therapy treatment planning.
intended_use_full: AutoContour is intended to assist radiation treatment planners in contouring and reviewing structures within medical images in preparation for radiation therapy treatment planning.
target_condition: Radiation therapy treatment planning for head and neck, thorax, abdomen, and pelvis anatomical regions
ground_truth: Manual consensus contours generated by three clinically experienced experts (2 radiation therapy physicists, 1 radiation dosimetrist) following NRG/RTOG guidelines
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) for CT structures: Large 0.92±0.06, Medium 0.85±0.09, Small 0.81±0.12. External validation DSC: Large 0.94±0.02, Medium 0.84±0.09, Small 0.76±0.09. External reviewer clinical appropriateness rating: 4.57/5.0 (scale where 5=no edits needed, 1=full re-contouring required)
